query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by bygningid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and bounding box

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand (by kommunenummer) with geometry and bygningid

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting Kristiansand bbox

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons intersecting Kristiansand bbox

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-flood polygons (200yr)

6.description: find buildings from previous step that also intersect flood polygons (200yr)

7.description: deduplicate buildings and keep min distance or unique ids
